spec.name: An Intersection In The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the dense forest. The forest gradually lightens to the north. Paths lead north, east and west.

north.description: The path leads north to a lighter part of the forest.

east.description: The small path leads east through the trees.

west.description: The small path leads west through the trees.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination.
